title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic's GTM team built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that helps sales reps draft customer replies in their own voice. The tool was created by Jared Sires, a GTM Product Manager with no coding experience, using Claude Code to reduce administrative burden on sales teams.
